final_text:
**RANInvestigator verdict**

**Root cause:** eCPRI fronthaul degradation on all three fronthaul links under **DU-MEL-01-2** caused DU overload, then sustained cell PRB congestion, RRC admission collapse, and URLLC slice SLA breach.  
**Blast radius:** **DU-MEL-01-2** and cells **CELL-MEL-01-2-1/2/3**.  
**Tenant/SLA impact:** **SL-URLLC-01 / SmartGridCo** is impacted and **breached**; active penalty exposure **USD 5,000/hour**.

## 1) Alarm sequence

| Time UTC | Source | Alarm | Sev | Meaning |
|---|---|---:|---|---|
| 09:10 | LINK-FH-CELL-MEL-01-2-1 | FRONTHAUL_DEGRADED | CRITICAL | Optical power below threshold; CRC rising |
| 09:10 | LINK-FH-CELL-MEL-01-2-2 | FRONTHAUL_DEGRADED | CRITICAL | Same |
| 09:10 | LINK-FH-CELL-MEL-01-2-3 | FRONTHAUL_DEGRADED | CRITICAL | Same |
| 09:10 | DU-MEL-01-2 | DU_OVERLOAD | MAJOR | L1 load elevated following fronthaul degradation |
| 09:15 | SL-URLLC-01 | SLA_BREACH | CRITICAL | Latency >5 ms; penalty exposure active |
| 09:25–09:55 | CELL-MEL-01-2-1/2/3 | PRB_CONGESTION | MAJOR | Sustained PRB >90% on all three cells |

**Finding:** causal chain is clean: **fronthaul impairment → DU overload → cell congestion → URLLC SLA breach**.  
**Noise:** **GNB-MEL-01 CLOCK_DRIFT** at 09:30 is minor and described as within tolerance; not causal.

## 2) Topology and affected elements

| DU | Cell | Band | Carried slices |
|---|---|---|---|
| DU-MEL-01-2 | CELL-MEL-01-2-1 | n78 | SL-EMBB-01, **SL-URLLC-01** |
| DU-MEL-01-2 | CELL-MEL-01-2-2 | n28 | SL-EMBB-01, SL-MMTC-01, SL-MMTC-02 |
| DU-MEL-01-2 | CELL-MEL-01-2-3 | n258 | SL-EMBB-01, SL-EMBB-02 |

**Finding:** only **CELL-MEL-01-2-1** directly carries **SL-URLLC-01**, but all three cells under the DU are degraded, so DU-level capacity stress is broad while SLA breach is slice-specific.

## 3) KPM correlation

### Cell KPMs
| Cell | PRB util recent | RRC success recent | Verdict |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| CELL-MEL-01-2-1 | 96.0–98.4% | 81.6–84.5% | Severe congestion, admission failures |
| CELL-MEL-01-2-2 | 95.7–97.8% | 81.8–84.5% | Severe congestion, admission failures |
| CELL-MEL-01-2-3 | 95.7–98.3% | 81.6–83.8% | Severe congestion, admission failures |

**Finding:** all DU-MEL-01-2 cells are well above the >90% congestion threshold; **RRC success is persistently ~82–84%**, far below healthy baseline.

### URLLC slice KPMs
| Time window | Latency | Throughput | PRB util | Active UEs | Verdict |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
| 09:00–09:05 | 3.08–3.15 ms | 70.7–76.2 Mbps | 51.6–53.4% | normal | Healthy baseline |
| 09:10 | 5.76 ms | 43.8 Mbps | 91.5% | 84 | First SLA miss |
| 09:15 | 8.48 ms | 37.5 Mbps | 93.0% | 78 | Breach confirmed |
| 09:20–09:55 | 10.41–13.78 ms | 25.0–31.2 Mbps | 94.5–96.0% | 60–115 | Sustained severe breach |

**Finding:** **SL-URLLC-01** fails both latency and throughput commitments after the 09:10 fronthaul event.

## 4) Slice, tenant, SLA impact

| Slice | Tenant | SLA | Observed | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SL-URLLC-01 | SmartGridCo | Max latency **5 ms**, min throughput **50 Mbps** | Latency **5.76–13.78 ms**; throughput **25.0–43.8 Mbps** | **BREACHED** |

| SLA policy | Tier | Penalty |
|---|---|---:|
| SLAP-SL-URLLC-01 | GOLD | **USD 5,000/hour** |

**Blast radius by service**
- **Direct SLA casualty:** **SmartGridCo / SL-URLLC-01** on **CELL-MEL-01-2-1**.
- **Broader radio impact:** all traffic on **DU-MEL-01-2** cells suffers congestion; this includes eMBB and mMTC slices on the same DU, though no explicit non-URLLC SLA breach alarm is present in current evidence.

## 5) Root-cause statement

**Primary fault domain:** transport fronthaul optics/eCPRI on **LINK-FH-CELL-MEL-01-2-1/2/3**.  
**Evidence:** simultaneous critical fronthaul-degraded alarms cite **low optical power + rising CRC**, immediately followed by **DU_OVERLOAD**, then sustained **PRB_CONGESTION** and URLLC degradation.  
**Conclusion:** this is **not** a core, CU, or timing-origin incident; it is a **DU-MEL-01-2 fronthaul degradation event** with radio resource collapse as the downstream symptom.

## 6) Immediate action focus

1. Restore optical power / clean fiber path on **LINK-FH-CELL-MEL-01-2-1/2/3**.  
2. Treat **DU-MEL-01-2** as degraded until fronthaul CRC/power normalize.  
3. Prioritize recovery validation on **CELL-MEL-01-2-1** because it carries **SL-URLLC-01 / SmartGridCo**.  
4. Keep SLA breach clock running until **latency ≤5 ms** and **throughput ≥50 Mbps** are sustained.

**Bottom line:** **Critical fronthaul degradation on all DU-MEL-01-2 eCPRI links is the root cause; affected cells are CELL-MEL-01-2-1/2/3; SmartGridCo’s URLLC slice SL-URLLC-01 is breached with active GOLD-tier penalty exposure.**
